title: psidium cinereum var. incanescens
intro: Psidium cinereum var. incanescens, also known as the Pink Guava, is a variety of the Psidium cinereum plant species, belonging to the Myrtaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Psidium cinereum var. incanescens include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. Psidium cinereum var. incanescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used as a topical application to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
